heading: Software We Specialize In
intro: We are certified partners for Malaysia's leading accounting and business software solutions.

items.name: AutoCount Accounting
items.desc: Malaysia's leading desktop accounting software. Full SST and e-Invoice ready.

items.desc: Automated payroll compliant with EPF, SOCSO, PCB, and EIS. Payslips in minutes.
